old_value: {"id":"workspace-g6m","title":"ADR-001: Framework Choice (cosalette)","description":"ADR: Choose cosalette as the application framework. Decision drivers: composition root pattern, async MQTT lifecycle, decorator-based device API, hexagonal architecture support, built-in health/availability, testing infrastructure (AppHarness, fixtures). Alternatives: raw paho-mqtt, fastapi+mqtt, custom framework.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:51:49Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:51:49Z"}

{"id":"workspace-h0s","title":"ADR-002: MQTT Topic Layout (domain-grouped)","description":"ADR: Define MQTT topic layout using domain-entity grouping. Topics: vito2mqtt/{device}/state for telemetry groups (outdoor, hot_water, burner, heating_radiator, heating_floor, system, diagnosis), vito2mqtt/{device}/set for writable parameters. JSON payloads with English keys. Home Assistant compatible.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:51:56Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:51:56Z"}

{"id":"workspace-9kx","title":"ADR-003: Hardware Abstraction (Hexagonal)","description":"ADR: Use hexagonal architecture with PEP 544 Protocol ports for hardware abstraction. OptolinkPort as the primary port. Connect-per-cycle strategy for serial sessions (not persistent). Adapter lifecycle via lifespan context manager. Dry-run mode with FakeOptolinkAdapter.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:52:04Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:52:04Z"}

{"id":"workspace-4sg","title":"ADR-004: Optolink Protocol Design","description":"ADR: Implement the Viessmann Optolink P300 protocol as an internal sub-package (vito2mqtt.optolink). Covers transport layer, telegram framing, data type codec, and Vitodens 200-W command registry. Clean-room TDD approach for implementation. English signal names throughout.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:52:13Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:52:13Z"}

{"id":"workspace-w3d","title":"ADR-005: Configuration \u0026 Settings","description":"ADR: Configuration management using cosalette.Settings subclass with pydantic-settings. Env var prefix VITO2MQTT_, .env file support, configurable polling intervals with sensible defaults (outdoor: 300s, burner: 300s, hot_water: 300s, heating_radiator: 300s, heating_floor: 300s, system: 3600s, diagnosis: 300s), serial port path, baud rate.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:52:20Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:52:20Z"}

{"id":"workspace-105","title":"Define OptolinkPort protocol (PEP 544)","description":"Define OptolinkPort as a PEP 544 @runtime_checkable Protocol. Methods: read_signal(name) → decoded value, write_signal(name, value), read_signals(names) → dict of values. The port abstracts away all protocol details — callers use English signal names and typed Python values.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:54:11Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:54:11Z"}

{"id":"workspace-0du","title":"Implement OptolinkAdapter (real serial)","description":"Real adapter implementing OptolinkPort using pyserial and the vito2mqtt.optolink sub-package. Connect-per-cycle: each read/write creates a serial connection, initialises communication, executes the command, and disconnects. Thread-safe via asyncio lock. Lazy import of pyserial.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-02-27T19:54:18Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:54:18Z"}

old_value: {"id":"workspace-gqa","title":"Read-before-write optimization for command handlers","description":"Change AccessMode.WRITE → READ_WRITE for all 42 writable signals (legacy analysis confirms bidirectional access at same address). Add read-before-write logic in command handlers: read current value, compare, skip write if equal. Add __force flag to bypass comparison. Coordinate with TI encoding (system_time). Requires planning doc. Legacy evidence: docs/planning/legacy/pyvcontrol/ — test_writesequence confirms read→write→read-back cycle at real hardware.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mail@fabiankoerner.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T08:39:08Z","created_by":"Fabian Koerner","updated_at":"2026-03-04T08:39:08Z"}
